{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-5","id":"msg_011Cd6dKRDfog1WVz2dSAPj8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DkJbesikE8wNfi4ywnAZ9j","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/solution.py","content":"class UsageError(Exception):\n    pass\n\n\n_OPTIONS = {\n    \"--mode\": {\"dest\": \"mode\", \"env\": \"APP_MODE\", \"default\": \"fast\"},\n    \"--preset\": {\"dest\": \"preset\", \"env\": \"APP_PRESET\", \"default\": \"balanced\"},\n}\n\n\ndef help_text():\n    return (\n        \"Usage: prog [--mode MODE | --preset PRESET]\\n\"\n        \"\\n\"\n        \"Options:\\n\"\n        \"  --mode MODE       Set the mode (env: APP_MODE, default: fast)\\n\"\n        \"  --preset PRESET   Set the preset (env: APP_PRESET, default: balanced)\\n\"\n        \"\\n\"\n        \"--mode and --preset are mutually exclusive; at most one may be supplied.\\n\"\n    )\n\n\ndef resolve(argv, env):\n    cli_values = {}\n\n    i = 0\n    while i < len(argv):\n        token = argv[i]\n\n        if not token.startswith(\"--\"):\n            raise UsageError(f\"unexpected argument: {token}\")\n\n        if \"=\" in token:\n            key, value = token.split(\"=\", 1)\n        else:\n            key = token\n            if key not in _OPTIONS:\n                raise UsageError(f\"unknown option: {key}\")\n            if i + 1 >= len(argv):\n                raise UsageError(f\"option {key} requires a value\")\n            value = argv[i + 1]\n            i += 1\n\n        if key not in _OPTIONS:\n            raise UsageError(f\"unknown option: {key}\")\n\n        cli_values[_OPTIONS[key][\"dest\"]] = value\n        i += 1\n\n    env_values = {}\n    for opt in _OPTIONS.values():\n        if opt[\"env\"] in env:\n            env_values[opt[\"dest\"]] = env[opt[\"env\"]]\n\n    supplied = {\n        opt[\"dest\"]: (opt[\"dest\"] in cli_values or opt[\"dest\"] in env_values)\n        for opt in _OPTIONS.values()\n    }\n\n    if all(supplied.values()):\n        raise UsageError(\"--mode and --preset are mutually exclusive; only one may be supplied\")\n\n    result = {}\n    for opt in _OPTIONS.values():\n        dest = opt[\"dest\"]\n        if dest in cli_values:\n            result[dest] = cli_values[dest]\n        elif dest in env_values:\n            result[dest] = env_values[dest]\n        else:\n            result[dest] = opt[\"default\"]\n\n    return result\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3721,"cache_read_input_tokens":27464,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3721},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"7f99b7ac-6559-438c-83ad-70aa0dd49953","uuid":"b417d8dc-5051-414a-97df-d03d0c3c6a94","timestamp":"2026-07-16T23:45:58.725Z","request_id":"req_011Cd6dKNsHbuhwAday3Fyux"}
